info.description: Real-time inventory management service for the RTS platform
info.title: Inventory Service API

post.description: Check availability for multiple SKUs at once (cart validation)

get.description: Check if a SKU is available and how many units are in stock
List all inventory items with optional filtering and pagination
Lookup an inventory item by its SKU
Get a single inventory item with aggregated stock levels

put.description: Update an inventory item's tracking and reorder settings

get.description: List stock movements with filtering. Default 30-day window, max 90 days.

post.description: Adjust stock with a reason (Admin only). Positive = add, negative = subtract.
Receive stock into a warehouse (Admin only)
Ship stock from a warehouse (Admin only)
Transfer stock from one warehouse to another atomically (Admin only)

get.description: Get a single stock movement by ID

post.description: Reserve stock for an order. Auto-selects warehouse with sufficient stock.
Confirm a reservation after payment. Idempotent.

get.description: Get all reservations for a specific order
Get stock levels per warehouse for a specific inventory item
get.summary: Get stock levels for an item

get.description: Get a single warehouse by ID

delete.description: Soft-deactivate a warehouse (Admin only). Rejects if has stock or is default.
